rationale: The citing paper note explicitly says it "extends prior sharing-economy impact research centered on Airbnb" and applies a similar platform-entry/downstream-revenue logic, which directly aligns with the cited Airbnb-vs-hotels study. The cited paper is a well-matched empirical precedent (DiD with rich robustness and heterogeneity/mechanism analysis), making it plausibly a methodological and conceptual anchor rather than a passing mention. With this evidence, it should be retained for full relation assessment.
